title: Spark Platform Build v2 train_5_l18 ticket pack
doctrine_enforcement_lines: Implementation is not stale by itself. Tickets become stale.
Apply maximum concrete capability within the approved scope of each ticket.

tickets.title: Train 5 refresh gate
tickets.objective: Verify selected backend train stability and screen-contract authority before frontend work.
tickets.scope: Verify selected backend train stability and screen-contract authority before frontend work. This is a preplanning ticket for train_5_l18; future execution requires explicit human approval and repo refresh. Approved future ticket authority is limited to level_18 within train_5_l18.
tickets.non_scope: No execution in this task. No production deployment. No production sensitive values. No dependency additions without explicit later approval. No cross-train expansion beyond train_5_l18.
files_forbidden_to_change: prisma/migrations/** unless the active ticket explicitly lists a migration path
generated/** unless the active ticket explicitly authorizes regeneration
required_outputs: Gate result artifact for T5-G001
PASS/WARN/STOP finding list
Evidence that dependencies are complete before this gate closes
validation_commands: local startup health smoke verification recorded when gate covers runtime-sensitive tickets
stop_conditions: Stop if exact-file plan reveals work requires files_forbidden_to_change.
Stop if the ticket cannot be completed without making an architectural decision not present in any committed source document.
Stop if validation fails after 3 bounded repair attempts.
Stop if work drifts into runtime, Foundry, module installer, business modules, production auth, deployment, protected values, or destructive migrations without explicit ticket authority.
Stop if a Prisma schema migration is required but not authorized in files_expected_to_change.
acceptance_criteria: T5-G001 records PASS or WARN-with-named-risk only after all dependencies provide evidence.
No STOP/high finding remains unresolved.
Gate closure references every dependency and produced evidence artifact.
Runtime-sensitive dependencies have local startup health smoke verification evidence or documented future-refresh requirement.
tickets.rollback_notes: Revert the future ticket commit for T5-G001; no production data migration or deployment authority is granted by this preplanning pack.
tickets.conditional_replan_required: Required if exact-file planning reveals forbidden files, missing source authority, dependency drift, or train-boundary leakage.
tickets.stale_ticket_risk_notes: Before execution, refresh against current main, re-run staleness scan, re-audit dependencies, and obtain explicit human approval.
tickets.runtime_consistency_chain: Repo truth scan -> train_5_l18 control plan -> seed matrix -> ticket pack -> ticket-pack audit -> future predictive stop analysis -> future autonomous readiness -> human approval.
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: T5-G001 gate artifact records PASS/WARN/STOP and lists dependency evidence by ticket id.
split_if: Split if work creates multiple runtime subsystems.
Split if schema/contracts and runtime implementation are not narrowly coupled.
Split if validation ladders are unrelated.
Split if file ownership overlaps another ticket.
requires_human_approval_if: Any dependency addition is needed.
Any production deployment or production sensitive value is needed.
Any architecture choice is not already committed.
Any cross-train scope is required.
tickets.failure_classification: STOP for source authority conflict, train-boundary leakage, protected-value requirement, unresolved high audit finding, or validation failure after bounded repair.
